Small Business Insurance and Liability

General liability, professional liability, product liability, workers' compensation, commercial property, and home-based business gaps.

Source shelf

  1. SBA Get Business Insurance (SBA)

User pain signals

  • youtube: High premiums and complex costs frustrate self-employed users.
  • reddit: User seeks business insurance recommendations based on customer service
  • reddit: Small business owner seeking advice on offering health insurance.
  • youtube: High monthly premiums make health insurance unaffordable for self-employed users.
  • youtube: High premiums for adding spouse to employer plan drive self-employed to alternatives.
  • youtube: High healthcare costs for self-employed individuals
  • reddit: Filter contractors by asking for General Liability insurance
  • reddit: Small business owner asks about unexpected compliance requirements.

Long-tail SEO angles

  • small business liability insurance checklist home based
  • seguro para negocio pequeño en casa

Sources

  1. SBA Get Business Insurance (SBA)
